# DataMuru

DataMuru is a provider-agnostic, Python-first data infrastructure framework for
declaring, validating, planning, applying, and governing data-platform resources.

Canonical docs: https://ajayaj2000.github.io/DataMuru/
Source repository: https://github.com/AjayAJ2000/DataMuru
Landing page: https://datamuru.vercel.app/

Current OSS capabilities:
- Typed YAML project configuration.
- CLI and Python API.
- Deterministic plan/apply/destroy lifecycle.
- Local state backend.
- Databricks alpha provider for catalogs, schemas, Unity Catalog grants,
  import discovery, and identity hooks.
- Snowflake state-only provider scaffold.
- Governance configuration for taxonomy, RBAC, and masking integration points.

Enterprise direction:
- SSO and Databricks CLI profile authentication.
- Account SCIM identity lifecycle.
- Import suite generation for workspace, RBAC, taxonomy, and masking review.
- Multi-workspace controls, compliance evidence, and private provider
  extensions.

Use the docs before generating examples because configuration shape changes as
the alpha matures.
